name: Pistachio Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and oats; gradually add to the creamed mixture and mix well.
4. Stir chips and 1 cup of pistachios into the dough.
5. Shape the dough into balls about 1-inch in size.
6. Place the balls 2-inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Press remaining pistachios onto the cookies.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Cool for 2 minutes before removing to wire racks.
Yield: about 9 dozen.
